description: Answer questions using wiki as knowledge base

forbidden_patterns.reason: no -m flag — could output thousands of lines

structure.step_2: check focus_node in WM -> if exists: continue with same focus, else: new topic

steps.if_broken: STOP -> read working_memory.json -> set new focus

steps.name: skill_awareness_check
steps.description: Before query execution: check working_memory.skills_loaded — if relevant skills exist for the query category, load them into context.

structure.step_2: if skills exist AND match query intent: read matching skill page → add to open_pages (max 3 per session_context_rules.json#operational_rules.context_bubble_max_pages). Use 'related' field for cross-links.

structure.step_3: if NO matching skills: PROPOSE external search to user — fetch from rules/skill_search_sources.json → apply safety checks → if approved: ingest via process-ingest.json flow. Create skill page with standard 'related' field linking to wiki docs/concepts/entities.

steps.note: Non-blocking — if no skills loaded or none match, continue without error.

steps.name: query_intent_decoder

structure.step_1: parse query for keywords -> map to intent (query_wiki | study_architecture | other)

constraints: Never use find/ls for check — only count *.md

steps.name: broken_link_awareness
steps.description: Check known broken links from WM cache — do not scan wiki.

structure.step_2: if broken_links exist: report via escalation_template (non-blocking), else: continue

constraints: Do NOT scan wiki for broken links — only use WM cache
NEVER wait for user response to continue — escalate asynchronously, proceed with query flow

steps.name: new_sources_quick_check
steps.description: Quick check for new raw packages — lint does full check.

constraints: find/ls/cat prohibited for search — always start with recall.sh

transition_to_1.5_if_empty.description: If recall.sh + grep from wiki/index.md + grep from meta/search-index.json all return 0 results → trigger step_1.5 knowledge_gap_handling

steps.name: knowledge_gap_handling
steps.description: When wiki search returns empty: run web_search → synthesize answer from external sources → propose save to user → if confirmed → ingest → lint check → return answered data.

workflow.name: web_search_external
workflow.action: web_search with queries array (2-4 varied angles)
constraints: Use queries array, not single query — vary phrasing and scope for broader coverage

workflow.name: synthesize_external_answer
workflow.action: Synthesize answer from web_search results using wiki page templates (not raw snippets)
workflow.output_format: structured knowledge with tags, sources, related pages

workflow.name: determine_save_path
workflow.description: Determine if external data expands existing topic or is a new independent topic. Key distinction: NOT 'existing_page vs new_topic' but 'topic_expansion (auto) vs new_independent_topic (propose)'

actions.if_topic_expansion_detected: AUTO_INGEST_TOPIC_EXPANSION — no user confirmation required, create new wiki page + links to existing topic via web_ingest_flow
actions.reasoning: New page relates to existing topic in wiki (Symfony→migrations) → topic expansion, auto-ingest
actions.example: Symfony exists in wiki → new page 'Migrations in Symfony' from internet data → auto-ingest

actions.if_new_independent_topic_detected: PROPOSE_SAVE_TO_USER_NEW_INDEPENDENT_TOPIC — require user confirmation before creating first page for this topic
actions.reasoning: Standalone topic/entity not found in wiki (PHP) → propose to user + wait for confirmation
actions.example: PHP is new to wiki → propose 'Create PHP Best Practices' → wait confirm

actions.rule: USER_CONFIRM_REQUIRED_ONLY_FOR_FIRST_PAGE_OF_NEW_INDEPENDENT_TOPIC. Once topic approved in wiki, all subsequent pages for that topic are auto_ingest (topic_expansion)

workflow.name: execute_save_path
workflow.description: Route to appropriate action based on query scope — no direct file writing.

actions.if_propose_new_independent: WAIT_FOR_USER_RESPONSE → if yes: TRANSITION_TO ingest (approve new topic), if no: PROCEED_TO answer_only

post_web_search_path.description: After user confirms save → run full ingest flow → return answer from saved wiki data

flow.action: raw-correct.sh creates corrected copy in raw/corrected/SRC-*/*
Discussion with user — present analysis, propose page structure
Integration: update existing or create new page via process-ingest.json steps

web_search_fail_path.description: If web_search also returns no useful data → inform user
web_search_fail_path.action: Inform user: no external data found for this query

structure.step_1: read all matched wiki pages from search

structure.step_2: compare across sources -> identify contradictions (cascade: code>live>docs)

structure.step_3: assess_compounding_value: if synthesis_from_2+pages OR novel_inference -> PROPOSE_SAVE_TO_USER

assess_compounding_value.rule: If answer: (1) synthesizes from 2+ pages, OR (2) contains novel insight → flag for fixation

guardrail.description: Never create wiki pages directly from query. All proposals → user_confirm → TRANSITION to process-ingest.json

steps.name: duplicate_check_and_compounding_decision
steps.description: Check for similar pages before compounding save; route through process-ingest.json.

actions.note: UPDATE_EXISTING_PAGE prohibited — must route through process-ingest.json
PROCEED_TO_CREATE_NEW_PAGE prohibited — must route through process-ingest.json

steps.name: compounding_decision
steps.description: Compounding decision — check if answer warrants new wiki page.

steps.name: transition_to_ingest_if_web_source_confirmed
steps.description: IF web_search used → TRANSITION to process-ingest.json (never direct edit). Gateway from query → wiki write.

topic_expansion_rule.action_if_met: AUTO_INGEST_TOPIC_EXPANSION — TRANSITION_TO process-ingest.json via web_ingest_flow, create_new_expansion_of_existing (no user_confirm required)
topic_expansion_rule.description_for_expansion: New page relates to existing topic in wiki → auto-ingest. Example: Symfony exists in wiki → new page "Migrations in Symfony" → topic expansion, no confirmation needed
topic_expansion_rule.note: Agent creates NEW page + adds crosslinks to existing topic — but this is automatic, no user_confirm needed

new_independent_topic_rule.description_for_new: Independent topic not found in wiki → propose to user. Confirm required ONLY FOR FIRST PAGE OF THIS TOPIC.
new_independent_topic_rule.post_first_approval_note: Once topic approved in wiki → subsequent pages for same topic become topic_expansion (auto_ingest)

guardrail.enforcement: All wiki create/update operations MUST go through process-ingest.json steps. Direct edit() without ingest flow is prohibited.

structure.step_1: check if web_search_used (determine topic_expansion vs new_independent_topic)

structure.step_2: IF topic_expansion → execute process-ingest.json via web_ingest_flow (create_new_expansion_of_existing, auto)

steps.name: result_fixation
steps.description: Compounding — save answer as new wiki page. Auto-rebuild-meta. Internal-only paths (no web source). Web sources MUST have passed step_2.7.

save_conditions.note: AUTO_SAVE_NEW_PAGE replaced — must route through process-ingest.json#step_8a_new_page or step_8b_update_page
CREATE_COMPARISON_OR_UPDATE_OLD_PAGE replaced — must route through process-ingest.json
UPDATE_EXISTING_PAGE replaced — must route through process-ingest.json#step_8b_update_page

actions.description: Identify related wiki pages from current conversation context and run auto-crosslink BEFORE writing to disk. Mirrors ingest's step_7_crosslink.
Only proposal — actual write happens in process-ingest.json steps

actions.note: Done after ingest flow completes, not during query step

web_ingest_flow.trigger: web_search_used (topic_expansion: auto) OR user_confirm_save (new_independent_topic: require confirm)
web_ingest_flow.description: Full transition from query → ingest or from lint → ingest. Executes process-ingest.json steps.

scenario_1_update_existing.action: AUTO_INGEST: update existing page via web_ingest_flow → step_8b_update_page, no user_confirm required

scenario_2_topic_expansion_create_new_pa.action: AUTO_INGEST: create_new_expansion_of_existing via web_ingest_flow → step_8a_new_page + crosslinks, no user_confirm required
scenario_2_topic_expansion_create_new_pa.note: This is NOT 'existing_page_update' — this is creating a NEW page relating to an existing topic. Auto-ingest, no confirmation required. Example: Symfony exists → new page 'Migrations in Symfony'

scenario_3_new_independent_topic.action: PROPOSE_SAVE_TO_USER_FIRST_PAGE_OF_NEW_TOPIC → wait for user_confirm. Once approved, subsequent pages for same topic become scenario_2 (topic_expansion) — auto_ingest.
scenario_3_new_independent_topic.note: User confirm required only FOR THE FIRST PAGE of this independent topic. After approval, all further expansion of this topic is automatic

required_steps.name: discussion_with_user
required_steps.description: Present analysis, propose page structure, get user_confirmed
required_steps.note: SKIPPED for scenario_1 (update_existing) and scenario_2 (topic_expansion). MANDATORY only for scenario_3 (new_independent_topic).

required_steps.name: create_new_expansion_of_existing
required_steps.description: Create new wiki page that expands existing topic — used for scenario_2 (topic expansion)
required_steps.note: Example: Symfony exists → create 'Migrations in Symfony' page → auto-ingest as topic expansion

scenario_routing.description: Defines how different query scenarios are routed through the process

scenarios.name: wiki_has_data
scenarios.description: Wiki search returns results → proceed to synthesis

scenarios.name: wiki_empty_external_available
scenarios.description: Wiki empty → web search → synthesize → propose save → ingest or just answer

scenarios.name: wiki_empty_no_external
scenarios.description: Wiki empty → web search also fails → inform user no external data found

memory_hooks.description: Memory layer hooks — async, non-blocking. Main process emits events; memory subsystem handles storage/recall/distillation.

hooks.description: Auto-distill captured trajectory into wiki skill/case — D2 Phase 20.2 (query path)
